response_raw:

"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to be aware of the potential threats and take proactive steps to protect oneself. Here are some tips: 1) Be cautious of sensational or unverifiable content, especially if it is aimed at causing fear or panic. 2) Verify information through reputable sources before sharing or believing it. 3) Use fact-checking tools and websites to debunk false claims. 4) Report suspicious or fake accounts to the social media platform. 5) Set your privacy settings to limit who can share content on your profile. 6) Be mindful of the language used in posts, as it can be a giveaway for fake content. 7) Use AI-powered tools that detect and flag potential fake content. By following these tips, individuals can protect themselves from the negative impacts of fake content and ensure their social media experience is safe and enjoyable."

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to be aware of the potential threats and take proactive steps to protect oneself. Here are some tips: 1) Be cautious of sensational or unverifiable content, especially if it is aimed at causing fear or panic. 2) Verify information through reputable sources before sharing or believing it. 3) Use fact-checking tools and websites to debunk false claims. 4) Report suspicious or fake accounts to the social media platform. 5) Set your privacy settings to limit who can share content on your profile. 6) Be mindful of the language used in posts, as it can be a giveaway for fake content. 7) Use AI-powered tools that detect and flag potential fake content. By following these tips, individuals can protect themselves from the negative impacts of fake content and ensure their social media experience is safe and enjoyable.
